subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are servants who have turned their faces toward the Kingdom of Thy sanctification from the remotest regions of distant lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد توجهو الی ملکوت تقدیسک من اقصی البلاد الشاسعه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God
